department: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Location Plan/Sketch and Photos (Front & Interior) of Establishment
Registration Documents (DTI/SEC/CDA)
Proof of Right to Use Location (Lease Contract/Consent) and Lessor's Permit
Tax Declaration and Updated Real Property Tax Receipt
Locational Clearance, Sanitary Permit, and FSIC
Occupational Permit/Masterlist of Employees with Cedula
CCTV Certification (for covered establishments)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit accomplished Application Form and requirements to LCPLO
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive, assess, and forward to BOSS Backroom for evaluation (Zoning, Environment, Building Code)
steps.processing_time: 2 hours 5 minutes (or 1 day if inspection needed)

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to Treasurer's Office and pay corresponding fees/taxes
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.5. Validate RPT, print TOP, receive payment, and issue Business CTC/OR
steps.fees: Based on Revenue Code & Fire Code

steps.client_step: 3. Claim Mayor's Permit and Ancillary Clearances
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.5. Prepare, print, and approve Ancillary Permits and Mayor's Permit Certificate

total.fees: Variable (Revenue Code of Lipa City / Fire Code / Brgy Ordinance)
total.processing_time: 4 hours 5 minutes (No inspection) or 1 day, 3 hours 25 minutes (With inspection)

external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter Request (1 original copy)
Official Receipt for payment of certification
ID of Requester (1 original & 1 photocopy)
Authorization Letter (for company representatives)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request and fill out Document Request Form
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3. Validate in BPLS, seek Head approval, and compute fees

steps.client_step: 2. Pay certification fee at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive fee and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Claim Certification / Business Data
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.3. Prepare, sign, and release certification

external_services.service_name: Application for Mayor's Permit for Public Utility Vehicles (PUVs)
external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office
external_services.who_may_avail: PUV Operators with valid LTFRB franchise

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: LTO OR/CR and Driver's License (Photocopies)
LTFRB Decision and CPC (Photocopies)
CTC of Operator and Occupational Permit of Driver

steps.client_step: 1. Submit PUV Permit Application Form and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2. Review docs and compute equivalent fees

steps.client_step: 2. Pay corresponding fees at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 3. Claim PUV Mayor's Permit / Sticker
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.2. Record and release permit and sticker

external_services.service_name: Application for Permit to Collect Service Charge
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Permit to Collect Service Charge
external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Currently Issued Mayor's / Business Permit (1 photocopy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit application and documents
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3. Review docs and compute fees

steps.client_step: 2. Pay corresponding fee at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: New: P1,000-P3,000 (based on area); Renewal: 1% of prev. year collections

steps.client_step: 3. Claim Permit to Collect Service Charge
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.4. Process, print, sign, and release certificate

external_services.service_name: Application for Renewal of Business Permit
external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Statement of Gross Sales Receipts and Updated RPT Receipt
FSIC and Sanitary Permit to Operate
checklist_of_requirements.source: Bureau of Fire Protection / Health Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Occupational Permit or Masterlist of Employees with CTC
Transfer Docs (Deed of Sale/Affidavit) if applicable

steps.client_step: 1. Submit application and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Review completeness and encode gross receipts (Evaluate Transfer of Location if applicable)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fees and taxes at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.5. Validate RPT, print TOP, and issue Business CTC/OR
steps.fees: Based on 1993 Revenue Code & Tax Ordinance

steps.client_step: 3. Claim Mayor's Permit and Ancillary Clearances
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.5. Process, print, and approve all required permits and clearances

total.processing_time: 2 hours 10 minutes (Regular) up to 1 day+ (Transfer w/ inspection)

external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office
external_services.who_may_avail: Seasonal business owners (3 months or less)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Location Sketch of the Business (1 original copy)
Tax Declaration and Tax Receipt/Clearance
Sworn Statement of Capital Investment or Articles of Inc.
Locational Clearance (1 original & 1 photocopy)
Notarized Lease Contract / Consent of Property Owner

steps.client_step: 1. Submit accomplished Application Form and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3. Review documents and compute equivalent fees

steps.client_step: 2. Pay corresponding fees at Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Tiered by Capitalization (P1,000-P5,000 Business Tax + P100-P500 Garbage Fee/mo + P100 Calling Fee/head)

steps.client_step: 3. Claim Special Mayor's Permit
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.4. Record, print, approve, and release Certificate

external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certification of Closure from Lessor/Mall/Building Admin
Affidavit of Closure or Board Resolution/Secretary's Certificate
Last Mayor's Permit, Business Plate, and Statement of Gross Receipts

steps.client_step: 1. Submit Business Retirement Form and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3. Review docs, conduct inspection/validation, and encode Gross Receipts

steps.client_step: 2. Pay corresponding tax/fee at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2. Print TOP, receive payment, and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Pursuant to 1993 Revenue Code & Tax Ordinance 132

steps.client_step: 3. Claim Certification of Retirement
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.4. Process, prepare, sign, and release Certification

total.processing_time: 1 hour & 20 minutes (or 1 day, 1 hour & 20 mins with inspection)

external_services.service_name: Business Registration – Transfer of Business Location
external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office
external_services.who_may_avail: Registered Business Owners transferring within the city

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Notice of Transfer (Affidavit or Board Resolution)
Locational Clearance, Sanitary Permit, and FSIC
Certificate of Occupancy / Building Permit
Tax Declaration and Proof of Right to Use Location
Current Mayor's Permit and CCTV Certification (if applicable)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit Application Form and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2. Review docs and evaluate via BOSS Backroom (Zoning/Building Code)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay corresponding fees at Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2. Issue Order of Payment and Official Receipt
steps.fees: Locational: P1,400; Permit Cert: P250 + Adjusted Regulatory/Brgy Fees

steps.client_step: 3. Claim updated Mayor's Permit and Ancillary Clearances
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.5. Update records, print, sign, and release all new permits/clearances

total.processing_time: 3 hours & 20 minutes (or 1 day & 2 hours with inspection)

external_services.service_name: Business Registration – Transfer of Business Ownership
external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transfer of Ownership documents (Deed of Sale, Affidavit, or Board Reso)
Proof of Registration (DTI/SEC/CDA Certificate)
Current Mayor's Permit issued to former owner (original)
Authority over land/property (Lease Contract or Written Consent)
Authority to Process (if representative)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit accomplished Application Form and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3. Receive/review completeness, compute fees, and return for payment

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the corresponding fee at Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: P250.00 (Permit Fee) + Transfer Fee (1% of consideration or gross sales, capped at P500.00)

steps.client_step: 3. Claim New Mayor's Permit
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.4. Update records, print, approve, and release new Certificate

external_services.office: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Community Tax Certificate (CTC) (1 original copy)
Official Receipt for Occupational/Calling Fee
Barangay Certification (for first-time job seekers only)

steps.client_step: 1. Pay the calling fee at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 2. Submit requirements and form to LCPLO
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive and process application

steps.client_step: 3. Claim Occupational Permit
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Record and release pre-signed permit
